message.content:
I'll describe each of the 6 UI screenshots in extreme detail to help you recreate them exactly. Let me go through each one systematically:

## Screenshot 1: Ad Manager Dashboard

**Overall Layout & Color Scheme:**
- Dark theme with #121212 background
- Primary accent color: #e50914 (Netflix red)
- Secondary colors: #1f2937 (dark gray), #374151 (medium gray), #9ca3af (light gray)
- Text: White (#ffffff) for primary text, #9ca3af for secondary text

**Header:**
- "Ad Manager" title in bold, 24px font
- Subtitle: "Manage and optimize your ad campaigns" in 14px
- Date range selector: "May 3, 2026 - May 9, 2026" with calendar icon
- "Create New Ad" button in red (#e50914) with plus icon

**Metric Cards (Top Row):**
1. **Total Revenue** (red icon):
   - ₹26.68 (large font)
   - +12.5% vs last 7 days (green)
   - Small red line chart

2. **Impressions** (purple icon):
   - 24,500
   - +8.3% vs last 7 days (green)
   - Small purple line chart

3. **Clicks** (orange icon):
   - 735
   - +14.3% vs last 7 days (green)
   - Small orange line chart

4. **CTR** (pink icon):
   - 11.94%
   - +6.7% vs last 7 days (green)
   - Small pink line chart

5. **Avg. CPC** (yellow icon):
   - ₹2.45
   - -4.2% vs last 7 days (red)
   - Small yellow line chart

**Performance Overview Section:**
- Title "Performance Overview" with "Live" indicator (red dot)
- Tab navigation: Revenue (active), Impressions, Clicks, CTR, CPC
- Line chart showing revenue trend (red line) with ₹18.72 value on May 6, 2026
- Y-axis: ₹0-₹30, X-axis: May 3-9

**Top Performing Ads:**
- Title with "View All" link
- 5 ads listed with thumbnails, names, types, and metrics
- Each has click count and revenue in red

**Campaign Budget:**
- Circular progress chart showing 75% of ₹10,000 spent
- Spent: ₹7,500, Remaining: ₹2,500

**Quick Actions:**
- 4 buttons: Create New Ad, Duplicate Ad, Edit Ad, View Reports
- Each with icon and description

**All Ads Table:**
- 25 Total entries
- Columns: AD INFO, TYPE/SLOT, STATUS, IMPRESSIONS, CLICKS, CTR, REVENUE, ACTIONS
- 5 rows of ads with thumbnails and details
- Pagination: 1-5 of 25, 10/page dropdown

## Screenshot 2: Revenue Overview

**Header:**
- "Revenue Overview" title
- Subtitle: "Track your revenue performance in real-time"
- Date range and filter/export buttons

**Revenue Metrics:**
- Total Revenue: ₹26,68,542.32 (+12.5%)
- Ad Revenue: ₹24,15,860.20 (+10.8%)
- Subscription Revenue: ₹1,32,400.00 (+15.3%)
- Other Revenue: ₹1,20,282.12 (+8.6%)
- Refunds: ₹99,214.00 (-4.3%)

**Revenue Trend:**
- Line chart showing daily revenue (red line)
- ₹18,72,540 on May 6, 2026
- Y-axis: ₹0-₹40K

**Revenue Breakdown:**
- Donut chart showing revenue sources
- Ad Revenue: 90.5% (₹24.15M)
- Subscription: 5.0% (₹1.32M)
- Other Revenue: 4.5% (₹1.20M)

**Revenue Summary:**
- This Week: ₹26.68M (+12.5%)
- Last Week: ₹23.71M
- This Month: ₹1,02,45,300 (+18.6%)
- Last Month: ₹86,45,120

**Average Revenue:**
- Per Day: ₹3,81M (+12.5%)
- Per Campaign: ₹18,542 (+9.3%)
- Per Ad Set: ₹3,245 (+7.8%)

**Revenue by Campaign Table:**
- 5 campaigns with thumbnails and detailed metrics
- Columns: CAMPAIGN, REVENUE, AD REVENUE, SUBSCRIPTION, OTHER REVENUE, REFUNDS, CHANGE, TREND

**Top Revenue Sources:**
- Bar chart showing top 5 campaigns by revenue
- Summer Sale Campaign: ₹8.52M (32%)
- Gaming Campaign: ₹6.23M (23%)
- Tech Promo Campaign: ₹4.75M (18%)
- App Install Campaign: ₹3.92M (15%)
- Brand Awareness: ₹3.26M (12%)

## Screenshot 3: Engagement Overview

**Header:**
- "Engagement Overview" title
- Subtitle: "Monitor interactions and engagement metrics"
- Date range and filter/export buttons

**Engagement Metrics:**
- Total Engagements: 24,58,320 (+18.6%)
- Likes: 12,45,210 (+15.2%)
- Comments: 2,34,567 (+12.7%)
- Shares: 1,25,430 (+20.4%)
- Saves: 85,113 (+17.3%)
- Click Throughs: 4,68,425 (+14.8%)

**Engagement Trend:**
- Line chart with multiple metrics (Likes, Comments, Shares, Saves, Clicks)
- May 6, 2026 data point showing detailed breakdown

**Engagement by Platform:**
- Donut chart showing platform distribution
- YouTube: 35.6% (8.74M)
- Instagram: 24.8% (6.09M)
- Facebook: 20.1% (4.93M)
- TikTok: 12.4% (3.04M)
- Others: 7.1% (1.76M)

**Engagement Rate:**
- 6.78% average engagement rate
- +1.25% vs last 7 days
- Best/Worst performing campaigns listed

**Top Engaging Ads:**
- Table with 5 ads showing engagement metrics
- Columns: AD PREVIEW, CAMPAIGN, ENGAGEMENTS, ER %, LIKES, COMMENTS, SHARES, SAVES, ACTIONS

**Engagement by Audience:**
- Bar chart showing age demographics
- 18-24 Years: 7,58,210 (30.8%)
- 25-34 Years: 9,12,430 (37.1%)
- 35-44 Years: 5,16,280 (21.0%)
- 45-54 Years: 2,01,340 (8.2%)
- 55+ Years: 70,060 (2.9%)

**Engagement Insights:**
- Lightbulb icon with insight about engagement rate being higher than 78% of advertisers

## Screenshot 4: Ad Performance Overview

**Header:**
- "Ad Performance Overview" title
- Subtitle: "Get insights into your advertising performance"
- Date range and filter/export buttons

**Performance Metrics:**
- Total Revenue: ₹26,68,542.32 (+12.5%)
- Impressions: 24,58,320 (+8.3%)
- Clicks: 7,35,842 (+14.3%)
- CTR: 6.78% (+6.7%)
- Conversions: 2,45,210 (+10.2%)
- CPR: ₹18.72 (-4.2%)

**Performance Trend:**
- Dual line chart showing Revenue (red) and Impressions (purple)
- ₹18,72,540 revenue and 48,540 impressions on May 6, 2026

**Conversions Over Time:**
- Bar chart showing daily conversions (red bars)
- Peak on May 6 with ~3.8K conversions

**Device Performance:**
- Donut chart showing device distribution
- Mobile: 59.6% (14,64,580)
- Desktop: 28.4% (6,96,800)
- Tablet: 8.7% (2,13,940)
- Others: 3.3% (82,000)

**Top Campaigns by Performance:**
- Table with 5 campaigns showing detailed metrics
- Columns: CAMPAIGN, REVENUE, IMPRESSIONS, CLICKS, CTR, CONVERSIONS, COST/CONV., ROAS

**Audience Demographics:**
- Age Range bar chart (18-24: 18.2%, 25-34: 37.5%, 35-44: 24.3%, 45-54: 14.6%, 55+: 5.4%)
- Gender donut chart (Male: 64.3%, Female: 35.7%)
- Top Locations list with map visualization

## Screenshot 5: Banner Analytics

**Header:**
- "Banner Analytics" title
- Subtitle: "Track detailed performance metrics for all banner advertisements"
- Date range and filter/export buttons

**Banner Metrics:**
- Total Impressions: 24,58,320 (+18.6%)
- Total Clicks: 73,842 (+14.3%)
- CTR (Avg.): 2.99% (+6.7%)
- Total Revenue: ₹26,68,542.32 (+12.5%)
- Avg. CPC: ₹3.62 (-4.2%)
- Total Conversions: 12,450 (+10.2%)

**Performance Overview:**
- Line chart showing Impressions (red), Clicks (purple), CTR (blue)
- May 6, 2026 data: Impressions 42,560, Clicks 1,250, CTR 2.94%

**Top Performing Banners:**
- Table with 5 banners showing impressions, clicks, CTR, revenue
- Columns: #, Banner, Impressions, Clicks, CTR, Revenue

**Banner Performance Table:**
- Filter tabs: All Banners, Active, Paused, Draft, Archived
- Table with banner details including placement and status
- 5 rows of banner data

**CTR by Placement:**
- Donut chart showing CTR by placement
- Top: 3.62%, Middle: 3.15%, Bottom: 2.75%, Sidebar: 2.62%, Others: 2.10%

**Device Performance:**
- Donut chart showing impression distribution by device
- Mobile: 65.2% (16,02,540)
- Desktop: 28.6% (7,02,860)
- Tablet: 6.2% (1,52,920)

## Screenshot 6: Dashboard

**Header:**
- "Dashboard" title
- Subtitle: "Welcome to Admin Prime! Here's what's happening."
- Date range and filter button

**User Metrics:**
- Total Users: 24,853 (+12.5%)
- Active Users: 5,472 (+8.3%)
- Total Videos: 12,453 (+18.7%)
- Total Views: 8.45M (+21.4%)
- Storage Used: 1.24 TB of 10 TB

**Views Overview:**
- Line chart showing views trend (red line)
- 7 Days selector

**Upload Overview:**
- Bar chart showing daily uploads (red bars)

**Live Users:**
- 2,431 users online
- Table showing recent user activity with avatars, usernames, activities, content, and times

**Top Performing Videos:**
- 5 videos listed with thumbnails, titles, creators, and view counts
- View All link

**System Overview:**
- System Health: 73% (circular progress)
- CPU Usage: 45%
- Memory Usage: 62%
- Disk Usage: 73%
- Network: 42%

**Recent Reports:**
- Table showing report details including ID, type, reason, reported by, content, time, status, actions

**Quick Actions:**
- 4 buttons: Upload Video, Broadcast, Clear Cache, System Logs

Each screenshot maintains consistent design patterns including:
- Dark theme with red accent colors
- Consistent card layouts with rounded corners
- Uniform typography (sans-serif, appropriate font weights)
- Consistent spacing and padding
- Interactive elements with hover states
- Data visualization using charts and graphs
- Table layouts with consistent column structures
- Pagination controls
- Action buttons and dropdowns

The color palette is primarily dark with red accents (#e50914) for primary actions and positive metrics, green (#10b981) for positive changes, and red (#ef4444) for negative changes. The overall design is clean, modern, and data-focused with clear visual hierarchy.
